## Validation

Record exact evidence. Do not mark a command as passed unless it was actually run locally or by GitHub Actions for this branch/commit.

Local commands:

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_repo_structure.py`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validation_summary.py`
- [ ] `cd ios && swift test`
- [ ] `cd ios && swift build`

GitHub Actions / connector evidence:

- [ ] Relevant GitHub Actions run checked for this commit / PR
- [ ] PR Change Scope checked
- [ ] Pull Request Quality checked
- [ ] Repo Audit checked
- [ ] Docs Consistency checked
- [ ] Swift workflow checked, if Swift code changed
- [ ] Phase 0 CI Validation checked, if required

Validation provenance:

- Commit SHA:
- Local environment:
- GitHub Actions run IDs / URLs:
- Commands not run, with reason:

## Checklist

- [ ] I used synthetic data only, or explained why data is not applicable.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, tokens, `.env`, signing files, model weights or private logs.
- [ ] I kept the change small and reviewable.
- [ ] I updated docs/tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I followed brand/logo rules if this touches visuals.
- [ ] I did not loosen privacy, approval or delegation behavior without explicit issue scope.
- [ ] I did not claim Swift build/test success without specific evidence above.
